message: Eid-ul-Adha holiday: School will be closed from 6th June to 8th June 2026. Normal schedule resumes on 9th June.
UKG Term-I examination timetable has been uploaded. Please check the schedule with your class teacher.
KG Annual Sports Day registrations are open. Submit event preferences to your class teacher by 5th June.
Fee payment for Q2 (April–June 2026) is due by 31st May 2026. Late payments will attract a penalty.
LKG parents: Please ensure your child brings their activity kit every Monday starting 2nd June.
UKG students will have an art and craft session on 3rd June. Please bring coloured paper and glue.
Summer break: School will be closed from 20th May to 25th May. Classes resume on 26th May.
KG story-time sessions will now be held every Friday from 11:00 AM to 11:30 AM.
Summer break: School will be closed from 1st June  to 15th July. Classes resume on 16th July  2026
